Who I Am

About Me

🎓

BCA Student

Pursuing Bachelor of Computer Applications with a strong focus on software engineering, databases, and modern web development.

⚡

Full Stack Developer

Building end-to-end applications — from polished frontends with React to robust REST APIs with Node.js and Express.

🎯

Goal-Driven Learner

Committed to continuous growth, working on real-world impactful projects, and mastering modern web technologies.

Hi, I'm Maroti Hajgule 👋

I'm a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) student with a deep passion for full-stack web development. I love crafting digital experiences that are not only functional but also elegant and user-friendly.

My journey in tech revolves around building end-to-end applications — from designing intuitive frontends with React to architecting robust REST APIs with Node.js and Express. I'm constantly pushing myself to learn modern web technologies and best practices.

"My career goal is to become an expert full-stack developer, contributing to real-world, impactful projects that solve meaningful problems at scale."

I believe great software is built at the intersection of technical excellence and thoughtful design — and I bring both to every project I work on.

Projects

Full-stack applications crafted with modern technologies.

Main Project

Hospital Management System

A comprehensive full-stack system to streamline patient care, doctor coordination, and hospital operations — powered by a modern REST API architecture.

  • Patient registration & medical records
  • Doctor management & scheduling portal
  • Appointment booking with real-time availability
  • Admin dashboard with analytics
  • Billing & invoice generation
